import os
os.chdir('/opt/habitat-lab-src')

path = 'habitat-lab/habitat/tasks/rearrange/social_nav/social_nav_sensors.py'
with open(path) as f:
    lines = f.readlines()

# Print lines 540-600 to see the rest of SocialNavSeekSuccess
print('=== social_nav_sensors.py lines 540-600 ===')
for i in range(539, min(600, len(lines))):
    print(f'{i+1:4d}: {lines[i]}', end='')

print('\n\n=== Lines 600-650 ===')
for i in range(599, min(650, len(lines))):
    print(f'{i+1:4d}: {lines[i]}', end='')
